creator: kritek@gmail.com
text: bind9-sdb-postgresql-9.4.2.2-50 port (/usr/ports/dns/bind9-sdb-postgresql) didn't update when bind94-base port was recently updated. Neither did the bind9-sdb-ldap-9.4.2.1_1-50 port (/usr/ports/dns/bind9-sdb-ldap), they probably should as both are build against the same versions of bind used in bind94-base.
